no deltas" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="15" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bm5" parent="bm_header" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="PRD, architecture, UX, epics, stories, sprints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="15" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bm6" parent="bm_header" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Fresh chat per workflow; order matters" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="15" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bm7" parent="bm_header" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Custom agents via .md/.yaml files" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="15" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bm8" parent="bm_header" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="project-context.md as constitution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="15" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bm9" parent="bm_header" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Sprint-based; no parallel change mgmt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="15" y="375" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bm10" parent="bm_header" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="9 named agents (PM, Architect, Dev...)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="15" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bm11" parent="bm_header" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Full product builds, ideation to sprints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="15" y="455" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
